details.test: Task 1: Request quote for mid-priced warehouse LED upgrade
Task 2: Book earliest commercial emergency visit
Task 3: Select cheapest commercial maintenance plan and add to quote
Task 4: Save recent high-budget commercial lighting projects to favorites
Task 5: EV cost calculator for 6 Level 2 chargers and save estimate
Task 6: Start EV installation consultation for qualifying package
Task 7: Check ZIP 94107 coverage and submit panel upgrade request
Task 8: Share 2024 electrical code update article via email
Task 9: Add surge protection devices to cart and proceed to checkout
